spanish: Podríamos tener alojados en data centers a modelos de inteligencia artificial tan potentes como serían las mentes más brillantes en cada área del conocimiento.
english: We could have hosted in data centers AI models as powerful as the brightest minds in every area of knowledge.
explanation: Conditional tense (podríamos tener) + comparative structure (tan potentes como serían) expressing a hypothetical future capability

spanish: El ejemplo más sonado pues sería el de Alpha Fall, donde se entrenó una IA para que aprendieran los patrones del plegado tridimensional de proteínas.
english: The most famous example would be AlphaFold, where an AI was trained so that it would learn the patterns of three-dimensional protein folding.
explanation: Passive voice (se entrenó) + imperfect subjunctive (aprendieran) after para que, expressing purpose in the past

spanish: Se ha declarado que posiblemente uno de estos problemas ya ha sido resuelto.
english: It has been declared that possibly one of these problems has already been solved.
explanation: Present perfect passive voice (ha sido resuelto) - compound tense combining haber + ser + past participle for a completed passive action

spanish: Y es que mes tras mes sus capacidades fronteras no han dejado de mejorar.
english: And the thing is, month after month their frontier capabilities haven't stopped improving.
explanation: Periphrasis no dejar de + infinitive - a B1+ construction indicating continuous action without interruption

spanish: Acabó llegando a una solución más general para el problema que él planteaba.
english: It ended up reaching a more general solution for the problem he posed.
explanation: Acabar + gerund (acabó llegando) - B1+ periphrasis indicating the final result of a gradual process
